name: Corn Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Mix together the corn and egg.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the corn mixture.
4. Stir slowly until combined.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Drop batter by tablespoonfuls into the hot oil, one layer at a time.
7. Fry about 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
8. Drain on absorbent paper and dust with powdered sugar if desired.
9. Makes 16 fritters.
